notes:
Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 4 (Day 52, May 11): üêõ FIX EVERYTHING ‚Äî entered the day with 0 open bugs, hunted four specific areas Day 51 had flagged, found **2 latent P1 crashes** in gridFocus + Big-Grid edge cases, fixed both same-day with **zero LOC delta**. (1) BUG-017: `handleGridKeyAction()` line 9338 only checked the *lower* bound on gridFocusRow/Col (`< 0`), never the upper. After Big-Grid 16x10 ‚Üí 12x8 toggle (or share-link decode of a small-grid hash while on big grid, or loadPuzzle's auto-shrink), `gridFocusRow=9 / gridFocusCol=15` are stale and out-of-bounds for the new 8x12 grid. Next `Enter` reads `state.grid[9][15]` ‚Üí `state.grid[9]` is undefined ‚Üí `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '15')`. Three call paths verified to reproduce: Settings toggle, decodeGridState (v2 hash with smaller dims), loadPuzzle auto-shrink. (2) BUG-018: same shape via the mouse path ‚Äî `handleRemoveCell(row, col)` line 5401 only guards `state.playing`, no bounds check. Delete/Backspace passes `hoveredCell.row/col`, and hoveredCell persists in module-level state across `initGrid()` rebuilds (only mouseover/mouseleave re-set it, neither fires automatically on grid recreation). If the user hovered (9,15) on Big Grid then toggled to Small Grid then pressed Delete *before any mouse move*, same TypeError. **Fix for both:** extend the existing one-line early-return guard with upper-bound clamps. Zero LOC delta because we just made the existing `if-condition` longer (no new lines, no new functions). Before/After: `if (gridFocusRow < 0 || gridFocusCol < 0) return;` ‚Üí `if (gridFocusRow < 0 || gridFocusCol < 0 || gridFocusRow >= ROWS || gridFocusCol >= COLS) return;` and `if (state.playing) return;` ‚Üí `if (state.playing || row < 0 || col < 0 || row >= ROWS || col >= COLS) return;`. Net file size: **11,192 ‚Üí 11,192 lines** (exactly equal ‚Äî Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied to the line). JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` on 297,740 bytes. Live-verified at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=52&fresh=1 post-push: cleared LS, reproduced both bug sequences exactly ‚Äî both `threw=null` after fix, no console errors, happy paths (place curve via Enter, rotate via Enter, remove via Delete) all still work. Other hunts came back clean: (a) Duplicate code grep on 24 critical function names ‚Äî each defined exactly once (the two `function el(tag, attrs)` matches at 4606/4664 are intentional nested helpers in createTrainSVG/createCarSVG, separate scopes, same as previous audits). (b) undoStack 50-entry cap behaves correctly: pushed 60 fake undos (capped at 50 via .shift()), popped all 50 (redoStack=50, undoStack=0), redid all 50 (undoStack=50, redoStack=0), next saveUndo trims again ‚Äî the redo() push bypasses the cap momentarily but self-heals on next normal saveUndo, no leak. (c) Share-link v1/v2 cross-compat clean: decoder accepts both v1 (legacy fixed 12x8) and v2 (explicit dims with size whitelist 8x12 OR 10x16); encoder always emits v2 since Day 45; mismatched user bigGrid state is auto-corrected by decode via applyGridSize before initGrid. Commit 52ab4dd pushed to main. Bugs found today: 2. Bugs fixed today: 2. Open bugs at end-of-day: 0. New lessons logged: LESSON-DAY52-A (bounds-check at consumer not producer for stale-coord globals), B (extend existing guards > add new lines for tight LOC budgets), C (hoveredCell doesn't auto-clear on grid rebuild), D (focused hunts > exhaustive checklist re-runs). Tomorrow Day 53 = Harden Week 2 Day 5: Regression Pass ‚Äî final ship-readiness check against original Day-1 promise (build, play, save, share) plus all Cycle-2 features (train names, big grid, cargo, replay, sound packs). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 3 (Day 51, May 10): üêõ PLATFORM & EDGE CASES ‚Äî first session this cycle to FIND BUGS, and we caught 2 latent P1 crashes in `handleGridKeyAction()` that had been hiding since before Day 14. Both fixed same-day on the live site. (1) BUG-015: `pushUndo is not defined` at lines 9346 & 9362 ‚Äî keyboard-driven placement (`Enter` to place selected tool at gridFocus) AND keyboard-driven rotation (`Enter` on existing piece) both threw `Uncaught ReferenceError: pushUndo is not defined`. The actual function is `saveUndo()`; `pushUndo` was a copy-paste rename mistake. Mouse/touch placement uses a different code path so the bug had slipped past Day 49 audit (which used direct API calls) and Day 50 puzzle audit (which used `placePiece` directly). Fix: rename both call sites `pushUndo()` ‚Üí `saveUndo()` (commit 6f668ec). (2) BUG-016: `SFX.click is not a function` at line 9350 ‚Äî exposed once BUG-015 was patched, the rotate-existing-piece path called `SFX.click()` which never existed. The intended call is `SFX.rotate()`. Fix: rename `SFX.click()` ‚Üí `SFX.rotate()` (commit 887ec88). Net LOC: +0 (both fixes were renames). File still 11,192 lines ‚Äî Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` on 297,640 bytes. Post-deploy verification on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=51&fresh=fix3: cleared LS ‚Üí completeTutorial ‚Üí state.grid wiped ‚Üí selectTool('curve') + setGridFocus(3,4) ‚Üí 5 sequential `Enter` keypresses produced rotation cycle 0‚Üí90‚Üí180‚Üí270‚Üí0 cleanly with `state.undoStack.length` advancing 1‚Üí2‚Üí3‚Üí4‚Üí5 and zero console errors. Other coverage: (a) Mobile 375√ó812 viewport ‚Äî sidebar correctly hidden via @media ‚â§768px breakpoint, mobile drawer mounted with all 26 palette items, drawer-toggle button cycles `.collapsed` class with CSS `transform: translateY()` collapse to 28px-handle-only; grid extends ~10px past each viewport edge (cellSize stayed at 32px because CDP didn't refire resize event for cellSize recalc ‚Äî not a real bug, real mobile browsers shrink cellSize). (b) All 4 biomes cycle correctly: spring (default, no class) ‚Üí winter (`biome-winter`) ‚Üí desert (`biome-desert`) ‚Üí autumn (`biome-autumn`) ‚Üí spring; persists to LS `trainTracks_biome`. (c) Night mode coexists with biome (combo class lists like `biome-desert night-mode`), high-contrast coexists with both (`biome-winter night-mode high-contrast` valid). 16 combos all renderable. (d) prefersReducedMotion() reads media query correctly. (e) Other keyboard shortcuts verified clean: `?`/`/` opens shortcuts overlay, `Tab` toggles `app.sidebar-hidden`, `n` night mode, `b` biome, `a` high-contrast, `w` weather (sunny‚Üírain‚Üísnow‚Üísunny), `r` random track (52 pieces + 1 train + 36 scenery after ~1s async build ‚Äî synchronous read-immediately gives 0 because `generateRandomTrack` uses 40ms-cascading setTimeouts for the place-animation; that's correct behavior), `+`/`-`/`0` zoom (1.0‚Üí1.3‚Üí1.8‚Üí1.4‚Üí1.0 verified via setZoomAtPoint), `z`/`Shift+z` undo/redo via saveUndo/undoStack mechanism, `1`-`9` TOOL_KEY_MAP for unlocked types (locked types fire `üîí [desc]` toast with progress count), `Esc` closes any of 10 modals + falls to clearSelectedTool. Backspace/Delete only removes `hoveredCell` not `gridFocus` cell ‚Äî DOCUMENTED design gap (not bug); kids using pure keyboard nav must use undo or trash zone instead, every other input path covers the need. (f) Stress: 96-cell rapid `placePiece()` fill in 18.3ms; 5-color trains placed in 2.0ms (state.trains.length===5, 1 per color enforced); Big Grid `setBigGrid(true)` swaps ROWS/COLS to 10√ó16 with 160 cells rendered in 31.3ms, 5 trains place cleanly, `setBigGrid(false)` restores 96 cells round-trip clean. (g) Fresh-LS cold start: cleared all 9 `trainTracks_*` keys ‚Üí tutorial auto-opens, default 6 unlocks restored, biome=spring, night=off, hc=off, weather=sunny, soundPack=classic, bigGrid=false, autosave=null, 96 cells render, zero console errors. Code health: file 11,192 ‚Üí 11,192 lines (zero growth ‚Äî both bug fixes were renames). Bugs found today: 2 (BUG-015, BUG-016). Bugs fixed today: 2. Open bugs: 0. Tomorrow Day 52 = Harden Week 2 Day 4: Fix Everything ‚Äî re-read BUGS.md for any latent open issues (none right now ‚Äî buy back time to hunt for *new* bugs in gridFocus+Big-Grid edge cases, share-link v2-on-legacy-client decode, undoStack 50-entry cap behavior, duplicate-code grep), no new features. Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 2 (Day 50, May 9): üß© PUZZLE & MODE TESTING complete ‚Äî zero new features (Harden mandate ‚úÖ), zero bugs found, zero console errors. Tested at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=50&fresh=1 with cleared localStorage. Coverage: (1) All 10 puzzles load correctly with proper locked-track count, scenery, and pre-placed trains: P1 First Loop (4 curves), P2 Around the Lake (4 curves + 6 water cells via direct placePiece), P3 Figure Eight (1 crossover), P4 Tunnel Run (4 curves + 4 water), P5 Grand Station (3 stations), P6 Switchyard (4 curves + 1 station), P7 Speed Run (4 curves), P8 Cow Pasture (4 curves + 4 cow scenery), P9 Night Express (4 curves + 1 tunnel), P10 Twin Loops (8 curves + red+blue trains). For each: puzzleState.active=true, puzzleState.puzzleId=N, #puzzle-hud has .active class, lockedCells map size matches, exitPuzzle restores sandbox cleanly. (2) End-to-end solves with star awarding: P1 (4 straights, par/optimal=4) ‚Üí 3 stars; P2 (10 straights around water, par/optimal=10) ‚Üí 3 stars; P8 (12 straights around cows, par=14, optimal=12) ‚Üí 3 stars. 'Full Loop!' toast fires on auto-detect; checkPuzzleSolution rejects empty state with '‚ùå 4 disconnected edges'; LS persists as trainTracks_puzzleProgress = {1:{stars:3},2:{stars:3},8:{stars:3}}. (3) Passenger delivery system end-to-end: togglePassengers persists to trainTracks_passengersEnabled=1; built test loop with 2 stations + red train, called startPlay + spawnPassengers, 2 .station-passenger DOM nodes rendered with count=1 each, 12s of running animation produced 2 deliveries (passengerState.delivered=2, gameStats.passengersDelivered=2 incremented and saved), HUD active with count visible, stopPlay cleans up (resetPassengerState clears stations + onboard). (4) Progression/unlocks (all 10 milestones): default 6 unlocked (straight, curve, tree, house, cow, train-red); pumped gameStats to thresholds (tracksPlaced=50, trainsRun=3, loopsCompleted=1, sceneryPlaced=15, puzzlesSolved=3, passengersDelivered=10) ‚Üí checkAndUnlockMilestones() fires all 10 milestones (Builder, Architect, Engineer, Miner, Conductor, Loop Master, Naturalist, Explorer, Rainbow Fleet, Magician) ‚Üí 19 new pieces unlocked (tjunction, crossover, bridge, tunnel via tracksPlaced; station/crossing + freight/passenger/caboose via Conductor; train-blue/green via Loop Master; water/flower/sheep via Naturalist; horse/duck-land/people via Explorer; train-yellow/purple via Rainbow Fleet; rainbow via Magician), all persisted to trainTracks_unlocks LS key as {pieces:[‚Ä¶]}; isPieceUnlocked() correctly gates locked pieces; unlockEverything() sets allUnlocked=true and persists as {allUnlocked:true}. (5) Share link round-trip across fresh session: built 17-piece complex layout (12-piece rectangle loop + 1 station r90 + 1 tunnel r0 + 2 scenery + 1 red train), encodeGridState ‚Üí 140-char hash 'AggM‚Ä¶' (v2 prefix byte 02, rows 8, cols 12 ‚Äî Day 45 format); wiped state.grid + state.trains + state.switchStates (simulated fresh page load), decodeGridState returned true, grid byte-identical after decode (gridIdentical=true) for all 17 pieces incl. station rotation, tunnel rotation, and scenery rotations; train decoded at correct (1,1) red. Train name + cargo metadata + sound pack remain documented Day-44/46/48 limitations (not bugs). (6) Screenshot/download: openScreenshotModal renders #screenshot-preview canvas at 2924√ó1948 px (4√ó scale of 731√ó487 grid container); canvas.toDataURL('image/png') returns valid 292,898-byte PNG with non-transparent center pixel (alpha>0); closeScreenshotModal removes .open class cleanly; downloadScreenshot + copyScreenshot handlers wired per code inspection. Console errors during full audit: 0. Code health: file 11,192 lines (UNCHANGED from Day 48/49 ‚Äî Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied). Bugs found today: 0. Bugs fixed today: 0. Audit fully written to BUGS.md. Tomorrow Day 51 = Harden Week 2 Day 3 (Platform & Edge Cases ‚Äî mobile 375px viewport, pinch-to-zoom, bottom drawer, keyboard-only nav, high-contrast, reduced-motion, all 4 biomes √ó night-mode combinations, fresh localStorage cold-start, rapid-placement + many-trains + huge-grid stress). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 1 (Day 49, May 8): üîç FULL FEATURE AUDIT complete on the deployed site ‚Äî zero new features (Harden mandate ‚úÖ), zero bugs found, zero console errors across a comprehensive black-box pass. Tested at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=49 with cleared localStorage. Coverage: (1) Page load ‚Äî tutorial overlay auto-opens, 96 cells render, no console errors. (2) Piece placement API ‚Äî all 9 track types (straight/curve/tjunction/crossover/bridge/tunnel/station/crossing/rainbow) accept via placePiece(); all 5 train colors (red/blue/green/yellow/purple) accept via placeTrain() (yellow/purple still palette-locked but API accepts ‚Äî lock is UI gating only); all 9 scenery types accept. (3) Random generator ‚Äî 8 sequential runs produced valid tracks each time; 6/8 (~75%) had matched cargo pickup+delivery pairs (within Day-46 spec of ~70%). (4) Play/Stop ‚Äî startPlay populates animStates, .animated-train element renders absolutely positioned with live opacity/transform updates, train traverses closed loop to completion (Full Loop! state stops play). (5) Tunnel animation ‚Äî train opacity drops to 0 inside tunnel cell, scale shrinks to 0.3 ‚Äî visual fade intact. (6) Day/night toggle ‚Äî night-mode body class flips, persists to LS. (7) Biome cycle ‚Äî 4 states round-trip cleanly. (8) Weather cycle ‚Äî sunny‚Üírain‚Üísnow‚Üísunny verified, currentWeather global advances. (9) Sound packs (Day 48) ‚Äî classic‚Üítoy‚Üídiesel‚Üíclassic cycle works, whistle f1 (880/1320/392), horn type (triangle/sine/sawtooth), filter freq all swap, persists to trainTracks_soundPack. (10) Big Grid (Day 45) ‚Äî 8√ó12‚Üî10√ó16 toggle works, cell count 96‚Üî160, ROWS/COLS update, persists. (11) Cargo missions (Day 46) ‚Äî stations gain cargoType/cargoRole, .station-cargo-badge renders, metadata survives reload. (12) Track Replay (Day 47) ‚Äî record‚Üístop‚ÜíclearAll‚ÜíplayReplay reproduces 5 actions (4 curves + 1 train) identically. (13) Train Names (Day 44) ‚Äî 'SPARK' name persists through reload via autosave. (14) Share-link ‚Äî encodeGridState‚Üí140-char hash 'AggM‚Ä¶' (v2 prefix=02, dims=8√ó12), decodeGridState round-trips piece types byte-identical. (15) Undo/redo ‚Äî both place and rotate operations reverse/reapply correctly. (16) Auto-save persistence ‚Äî reload preserves 4 pieces incl. cargo metadata, sound pack 'diesel', train name 'SPARK', biome, big-grid setting, all 9 LS keys (trainTracks_weather, _nightMode, _soundPack, _stats, _unlocks, _autosave, _tutorialDone, _biome, _bigGrid). (17) All 10 modals open ‚Äî tutorial, settings, share, puzzle (10 cards), save/load (3 slots), train names, track replay (Record/Replay/Clear buttons), screenshot, stats, shortcuts. (18) All 10 puzzles ‚Äî loadPuzzle(1)‚Ä¶(10) all succeed, gridFilled varies 1‚Äì10 pieces, exitPuzzle restores. (19) HONK button ‚Äî #btn-horn üìØ accessible. (20) Toolbar ‚Äî 47 enabled buttons total. Code health: file 11,192 lines (UNCHANGED from Day 48 ‚Äî Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied), JS parses cleanly via new Function(js) on 297,639 bytes, HTML tags balanced (div 170/170, span 101/101, button 53/53, script 1/1, style 1/1), no duplicate function defs (placeTrain vs placeTrainOnLoop are intentionally distinct, same as Day 37 baseline). 4 KNOWN LIMITATIONS catalogued (not bugs ‚Äî documented trade-offs): (a) train names not in share-link (Day 44), (b) cargo metadata not in share-link (Day 46), (c) sound pack not in share-link (Day 48), (d) big-grid replay played back on small grid silently drops out-of-bounds steps (Day 47). Bugs found today: 0. Bugs fixed today: 0. Audit fully written to BUGS.md. Tomorrow Day 50 = Harden Week 2 Day 2 (Puzzle & Mode Testing ‚Äî play through ALL 10 puzzles end-to-end verifying solvability + star awards, exercise passenger delivery system, test progression/unlock milestones, round-trip share links across fresh sessions, test screenshot/download canvas render). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 5 (Day 48, May 7): üîä SOUND PACKS shipped ‚Äî Cycle 2 Build Week is COMPLETE. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md (final day). Three timbral palettes for the train‚Äôs whistle, chug rhythm, station horn, and HONK button: üö¢ Classic (current sounds, 880Hz sine whistle, 800Hz bandpass chug, triangle horn), üß∏ Toy Steamer (1320Hz sine whistle, 1400Hz softer chug, sine horn at 1.6√ó pitch, brighter noise hiss), üöÜ Modern Diesel (392Hz sawtooth whistle, 360Hz low rumble chug, sawtooth horn at 0.7√ó pitch, gritty 1200Hz noise burst). Architecture: new `SOUND_PACKS = {classic, toy, diesel}` config object near the audio engine, each pack contains parameters for whistle (f1/f2/type/vol/dur/delay), chug (filterFreq/filterQ/vol + accentLow/High/VolLow/VolHigh/Type), horn (mul/mainType/harmonicMul/harmonicType/noiseFreq/noiseVol), and station (tone1Type/tone2Type/overtoneType/overtoneVol). The SFX functions themselves stay shared and just call `getSoundPack().whistle.f1` etc. ‚Äî zero duplicated synthesis code. Modified four playback paths: SFX.whistle (start of play 2-tone), SFX.station (3-oscillator station horn), playChugWithEcho + startChugLoop accent (chug rhythm during play), playHornSound (HONK button per-color horn). Per-pack pitch shifts on horn use a multiplier on HORN_PITCHES so the per-color (red/blue/green/yellow/purple) variation is preserved ‚Äî toy steamer = bright high-pitched sine across all 5 colors, diesel = bass-y sawtooth across all 5. New Settings entry üîä 'Sound: Classic/Toy/Diesel' is a CYCLE button (not a dropdown) ‚Äî click rolls Classic‚ÜíToy‚ÜíDiesel‚ÜíClassic with a tiny preview whistle on each change so kids hear the difference instantly; toast confirms `üö¢ Sound Pack: Classic`. Persistence via new localStorage key `trainTracks_soundPack` (just the name string), restored in init() right after restoreAudioSettings(); restoreSoundPack() validates the key against SOUND_PACKS so corrupt LS falls back to classic. Live-tested at https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=48: clear LS ‚Üí default `classic` ok, params byte-identical to pre-Day-48 (whistle 880Hz sine, chug filter 800, horn triangle 1.0√ó) ‚úì; cycle Classic‚ÜíToy‚ÜíDiesel‚ÜíClassic ‚Äî pack name + LS key + whistle f1 + horn mainType all flip on each cycle (880‚Üí1320‚Üí392‚Üí880; triangle‚Üísine‚Üísawtooth‚Üítriangle) ‚úì; randomGen ‚Üí 46 pieces + 1 train ‚Üí startPlay with diesel pack ‚Üí audio context running, getSoundPack() returns chug filter 360 + horn sawtooth + accent pitch 55 (vs classic's 800/triangle/90) ‚úì; mid-play setSoundPack('toy') without stopPlay ‚Üí next chug beat uses 1400Hz filter, blowHorn() right after fires sine 1.6√ó horn ‚Äî swap takes effect on the very next event because getSoundPack() is read inside playback funcs not closed-over ‚úì; reload page ‚Üí currentSoundPack='diesel', LS='diesel', getSoundPack().name='Modern Diesel' restored before first paint ‚úì; openSettingsMenu ‚Üí 'Sound: Diesel' label correct on first open (no stale-label bug because openSettingsMenu calls updateSoundPackSettingsLabel) ‚úì; cycle to classic via Settings button ‚Üí label updates to 'Sound: Classic' without closing the menu (intentional: kids can keep cycling) ‚úì. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` syntax check on the inlined script tag (297,639 bytes). Code health: 11,099 ‚Üí 11,192 lines (+93 net for the entire feature: ~62 lines for SOUND_PACKS config + helpers, ~8 lines tweaks across SFX.whistle/SFX.station/playChugWithEcho/playHornSound/init(), ~1 line for the Settings button). Acceptance from roadmap: ‚úì switch packs in Settings, ‚úì hear a clearly different whistle and chug (Classic 880Hz sine vs Toy 1320Hz sine vs Diesel 392Hz sawtooth ‚Äî verified via `getSoundPack().whistle.f1` reads), ‚úì pack persists across reload (LS round-trip), ‚úì zero size-bloat of audio assets (still all synthesized via existing playNote/createOscillator paths). KNOWN LIMITATIONS: (1) the choice does NOT round-trip via share-link ‚Äî pack is a per-device preference not a layout property; (2) other smaller SFX (place / rotate / build / passenger / etc.) intentionally untouched ‚Äî only the 'train voice' (whistle/chug/horn/station) responds to pack to keep UI sounds consistent across packs. Cycle 2 Build Week is now CLOSED (5 features shipped: Train Names, Big Grid, Cargo Missions, Track Replay, Sound Packs). Tomorrow Day 49 = HARDEN Week 2 Day 1 (Full Feature Audit on the deployed site ‚Äî test every piece type, every train, every scenery, every save/load + share/screenshot/keyboard, document every bug in BUGS.md). New patterns logged: LESSON-DAY48-A (config-object refactor for SFX timbral variety), LESSON-DAY48-B (read pack params per-call not at-init for live swap), LESSON-DAY48-C (cycle button > dropdown for kid UX with 3+ states), LESSON-DAY48-D (label refresh hooks at 3 sites), LESSON-DAY48-E (persist key not value, validate on restore). Old notes preserved below.

Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 4 (Day 47, May 6): üëª TRACK REPLAY / GHOST TRAIN shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md. New Settings entry 'üëª Track Replay' opens a modal with three buttons: üî¥ Record / ‚èπÔ∏è Stop, ‚ñ∂Ô∏è Replay, üóëÔ∏è Clear. Implementation: state gains `replayRecording` (bool), `replayActions` (array of `{kind:'place'|'remove'|'rotate'|'placeTrain'|'clearAll', row, col, type?, rotation?, color?}` records), `replayBaseline` (snapshot of grid+trains+switchStates+bigGrid taken at REC start). Recording hooks installed inside `placePiece`, `removePiece`, `rotatePiece`, `placeTrain`, `clearAll` ‚Äî each calls `logReplayAction(‚Ä¶)` at the top, which appends to the action log when `state.replayRecording && !replayApplying`. Replay flow: stop play if running, restore baseline silently (replayApplying=true so action hooks don't re-record), re-call the same low-level functions on a fixed 600ms cadence (200ms when prefers-reduced-motion), update `üëª Replaying ‚Ä¢ k/N` indicator each step, then 500ms after the last step `startPlay()` auto-runs the train if any are placed. Cancel handling via incrementing `replayCancelTokenId` (new `playReplay()` invalidates earlier in-flight runs). Ambient REC/ghost indicator pill (top-center) toggles between red `REC ‚Ä¢ N steps` while recording and purple `üëª Replaying ‚Ä¢ k/N` during playback, with pulsing dot animation that respects prefers-reduced-motion. UI lock during replay via `body.replay-active` CSS rule (pointer-events:none on #grid, #sidebar, #drawer-content, #toolbar, #trash-zone, plus filter:saturate(0.85) on #grid for visual ghost feel). Persistence: separate localStorage key `trainTracks_replay` stores `{baseline, actions}` JSON ‚Äî ~880 bytes for a 5-step recording. Restored in `init()` after `loadGameStats/loadUnlockState/etc`. Settings menu's Track Replay label dynamically shows 'üî¥ Recording (N)' / 'Replay (N steps)' / 'Track Replay' depending on state. Esc closes the new modal; outside-click closes; modal is blocked while a puzzle is active. Live-tested on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=47: clean LS ‚Üí startReplayRecording() captures empty baseline + replayRecording=true + indicator visible ‚úì; placed 4 curves + 1 train via direct calls ‚Üí 5 actions logged with correct kinds (4 place + 1 placeTrain) ‚úì; stopReplayRecording() ‚Üí saved=true, savedActions=5 in LS, indicator hidden ‚úì; cleared board (4‚Üí0 pieces) ‚Üí playReplay() ‚Üí step probes at +1s/+3.5s/+5s confirmed: 1s in 2 pieces placed, 3.5s in 4 pieces + 1 train, 5s in playing=true + animTrains=1 (auto-startPlay fired ~3.5‚Äì4s after replay end) ‚úì; reload page ‚Üí state.replayActions=5, baselinePresent=true, baselineGridLen=8 (12-col grid, 8 rows) ‚úì; modal status 'Saved replay: 5 steps', Replay button enabled, Settings label 'Replay (5 steps)' ‚úì; clearReplay() ‚Üí actions=0, baseline=null, LS removed, modal back to 'No replay saved yet' ‚úì. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` syntax check on the inlined script tag (293,273 bytes). Code health: 10,734 ‚Üí 11,099 lines (+365 net for full feature: ~85 lines CSS for modal + indicator + grid lock, ~16 lines HTML for modal/indicator markup + Settings entry, ~265 lines JS for engine + hooks + persistence + UI helpers). Acceptance from roadmap: ‚úì build a 6-piece loop with REC on (4-curve loop + train tested, system handles 5+ actions cleanly), ‚úì press Replay ‚Üí ghost rebuilds piece-by-piece, ‚úì train auto-runs at end. Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 3 (Day 46, May 5): üì¶ CARGO DELIVERY MISSIONS shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md. Stations gained optional metadata (cargoType: logs|milk|mail|coal, cargoRole: pickup|delivery). Random gen ~70% chance pairs two stations as a cargo mission with matching type ‚Äî if it can‚Äôt find a 2nd straight to promote, falls back to plain station. Visuals: pulsing badge in upper-left corner of station shows cargo emoji (ü™µü•õ‚úâÔ∏èü™®) with role-coded ring (orange=pickup, green=delivery). Train picks up cargo when entering a pickup station empty (toast 'ü™µ Logs loaded!' + SFX.passengerBoard() + emoji badge follows the loco above-right of name label). Matching delivery station drops it off (+1 stat, +confetti, +SFX.passengerDeliver(), badge cleared). New cargo HUD pill (top-right desktop / bottom-right mobile) shows session deliveries. gameStats.cargoDelivered tracked (visible in Stats modal). Two test scares caught and fixed in-session: (1) renderCell didn‚Äôt strip .station-cargo-badge so multiple gens piled up old badges ‚Äî fixed by adding it to the cell-clear list AND inserting cleanupStationCargoBadges() at randomGen start; (2) resetCargoState (called on stopPlay) was wiping all station badges along with train badges, so badges vanished after every play ‚Äî fixed by limiting reset to train badges only and re-rendering station badges from renderCell when a piece has cargoType. Live test on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=46&bust=3: clear localStorage ‚Üí 6 randomGens ‚Üí 4 had cargo pairs (consistent with 70%) ‚úì; final track 2 stations both ü™® coal pickup+delivery with badges visible, 22x22px, role data attribute correct ‚úì; startPlay ‚Üí 24s of running ‚Üí cargoState.delivered=2, gameStats.cargoDelivered=2, HUD 'üì¶ Cargo: 2' ‚úì; stopPlay ‚Üí stationBadges=2 still visible, trainBadges=0 wiped, hudActive=false ‚úì; reload page ‚Üí cargo metadata persists in state.grid via JSON auto-save, 2 station badges re-rendered, gameStat=2 persists ‚úì. Zero console errors on deployed site. JS parses cleanly. Code health: 10,461 ‚Üí 10,734 lines (+273 net for full feature: ~85 lines CSS + ~10 lines HTML + ~180 lines JS for system/random-gen/animation hooks). Acceptance from roadmap: ‚úì random gen produces ‚â•1 cargo pair (~70% rate), ‚úì loco picks up + delivers + confetti, ‚úì deliveries persist in stats, ‚úì cargo metadata survives save/load + reload. Prior: Cycle 2 Build Week, Day 2 (Day 45, May 4): üü¶ BIG GRID MODE shipped. Roadmap item from cycle-2-build.md (Day 14 wishlist's last open item). Toggle in Settings: 'üü¶ Big Grid: 12√ó8 / 16√ó10'. Code surgery: (1) ROWS/COLS converted from const to let so a single applyGridSize() can swap dims (60+ call sites unchanged thanks to dynamic resolution). (2) New constants SMALL_GRID={rows:8,cols:12}, BIG_GRID={rows:10,cols:16}, BIG_GRID_KEY='trainTracks_bigGrid'. (3) state.bigGrid added. (4) New helpers: applyGridSize, normalizeStateGridToCurrent (clips when shrinking / pads with null when growing; drops out-of-bounds trains and switch keys), setBigGrid (full pipeline: stop play, swap dims, normalize, persist, recompute cellSize, initGrid, renderAllCells, label refresh, autoSave, toast), updateBigGridLabel, restoreBigGrid, toggleBigGrid. (5) restoreBigGrid runs FIRST in init() before calculateSize/initGrid so first paint uses correct dims; then normalizeStateGridToCurrent grows the module-load default 8x12 state.grid. (6) deserializeState calls normalizeStateGridToCurrent so loaded auto-saves with mismatched dims clip/pad cleanly. (7) loadPuzzle auto-switches back to small grid (with toast 'üß© Puzzles use the small grid ‚Äî switching back') because all 10 puzzles are authored for 12x8. (8) Share-link format bumped to v2: byte 0 = version (1=legacy 12x8, 2=explicit dims), v2 adds bytes 1-2 = rows,cols. Decoder accepts BOTH versions; v2 only accepts the two whitelisted sizes (8x12 or 10x16). Encoder always emits v2. (9) Settings menu now also calls updateBigGridLabel on open so a fresh paint shows the right state. Live test on https://mikedyan.github.io/train-tracks/?v=45: clear localStorage ‚Üí default 12x8, 96 cells ‚úì; randomGen ‚Üí 11 pieces; setBigGrid(true) ‚Üí 160 cells, 10 rows x 16 cols, label '16√ó10', localStorage '1', original 11 pieces preserved in upper-left, 0 pieces in extended region ‚úì; place pieces at (9,15) and (8,14), setBigGrid(false) ‚Üí those 2 pieces dropped (clip), 12x8 restored ‚úì; reload page ‚Üí 16x10 restored from localStorage ‚úì; loadPuzzle(1) from big grid ‚Üí auto-switches to 12x8 + puzzle starts ‚úì; encode 16x10 layout ‚Üí hash 226 chars ‚Üí setBigGrid(false) ‚Üí decodeGridState(hash) ‚Üí auto-swaps back to 16x10, all 3 test pieces (corner/center/far-corner) + train survive byte-identical ‚úì; small-grid v2 hash starts 'AggM' = bytes 02 08 0C ‚úì (version=2, rows=8, cols=12); placed loop in big grid + startPlay ‚Üí train animates, no console errors ‚úì. Zero console errors on deployed site. Code health: 10,335 ‚Üí 10,461 lines (+126 net for the entire feature). Acceptance: ‚úì toggle on/off in Settings, ‚úì grid grows 12x8‚Üí16x10, ‚úì existing tracks survive, ‚úì puzzles disabled (auto-revert), ‚úì share-link encodes grid size, ‚úì reload persistence. New patterns logged: LESSON-DAY45-A (const‚Üílet dynamic dims for cheap reactive globals), LESSON-DAY45-B (migration-friendly share-link versioning), LESSON-DAY45-C (ordering: layout restores must precede first paint), LESSON-DAY45-D (modal-label refresh needs three hooks: toggle, opener, restore). Prior: Prune Week 1, Day 4: DELIGHT POLISH complete. Four small but meaningful improvements landed. (1) Train animation smoothness: added a sub-pixel vertical chuff bob to the locomotive (¬±1.2px sine of performance.now()*0.012) inside renderTrainAtProgress, plus per-car bob with index-based phase offset (¬±1.0px) so trailing cars wave gently behind the loco. Both honor prefers-reduced-motion. The bob is small enough to feel like life rather than wobble ‚Äî chassis 'breathes' as it rolls. (2) Sound timing: tightened the play-start audio stack ‚Äî startChugLoop delay 500‚Üí350ms and startSmokeLoop 300‚Üí200ms so the whistle blends into the chuff/smoke instead of opening a quiet gap. (3) Better default random generation: every random track now gets exactly one station promoted from a random straight (kid reward = 'Toot toot!' callout + passenger pickup if enabled), and 25% of tracks additionally promote one straight to a rainbow tile for sparkle/magic. Verified live: 10/10 random gens produced 1 station each, 1/10 produced a rainbow (within noise of 25%). Tunnels still appear at the original ~20% rate. (4) PRUNE balance: collapsed 4√ó 'snap to end-of-cell, render, crash, return' repetition in advanceTrainAnim into a single crashTrainHere(anim) helper. Browser regression check passed: random track ‚Üí play ‚Üí train chuffed through 5+ cells in 4s without crashing or visual stutter. JS parses cleanly. File 10137‚Üí10144 lines (+7 net; mostly inline comments + the new promote helper for station/rainbow). Tomorrow Day 43 = PRUNE Day 5 (Expert Panel + Validation ‚Äî score 10 dimensions vs Day 14 baseline, write reviews/prune-cycle-1-review.md, close out cycle 1 prune week). Old notes preserved below.
